ogTitle: Hawley Beach vs Hellyer: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Hawley Beach and Hellyer.
heading: Hawley Beach vs Hellyer — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hawley Beach, Tasmania and Hellyer, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hellyer has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Hawley Beach (47/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hawley Beach or Hellyer safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hawley Beach has a flood risk score of 58/100, while Hellyer scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hawley Beach scores 49/100 for bushfire risk. Hellyer scores 23/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hawley Beach or Hellyer?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hellyer has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
